opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My penis suddenly bent sharply to the left during an erection tonight, and the pain was so sharp I thought it had snapped. I'm terrified I've done permanent damage.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened out of nowhere during an erection tonight — the bend and the pain were so bad I panicked and I need to know if I've broken it.

symptom_narrative.onset: the sharp pain and severe bending came on suddenly tonight during an erection, but I'd had a bit of mild discomfort down there on and off for about a month before
symptom_narrative.duration: the acute episode was tonight; the low-grade ache has been building over the past month
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, severe pain and an unnatural sideways bend to the left when I was hard; it also looked shorter and kind of pinched in the middle like an hourglass
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain during the erection was about the worst I've had — I genuinely thought something had torn
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the shaft of my penis, more on the top-left side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: only when I get an erection — it's fine otherwise
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: the pain completely goes away once it goes soft again
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: getting an erection brings back the bend and the pain
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I couldn't have sex because of the pain and the bend, and I couldn't really keep the erection
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing this bad before — just the mild niggling discomfort over the last month
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't have sex and I'm pacing around the house too anxious to settle

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home alone this evening; wearing loose clothing to avoid any rubbing

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, repeatedly seeking reassurance that the penis is not permanently damaged

reluctance_topics: embarrassment discussing genital and sexual function

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-stated from memory, not weighed during the encounter
